member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PayableEntityDto
member.summary: Data transfer objects used to return payable entities data.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PayableEntityItemDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to return payable entity item information.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PayableEntityMapper
member.summary: Provides data mapping services for payable entities and their items.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentInstructionHolderDto
member.summary: Output DTO with a payment instruction holder.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentInstructionActions
member.summary: Output DTO used to return available actions for a payment instruction.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentInstructionDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to return payment instruction.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentInstructionDescriptor
member.summary: Output DTO used to return minimal payment instruction's data for use in lists.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentInstructionLogDescriptorDto
member.summary: Data transfer objects used to return payment instruction log.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentInstructionLogMapper
member.summary: Provides data mapping services for payment log.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentOrderHolderDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to return a complete payment order.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentOrderDto
member.summary: Output DTO used to return a payment order.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentOrderDescriptor
member.summary: Output DTO used to return minimal payment order's data for use in lists.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentOrderItemDto
member.summary: Data transfer objects used to return payment order items.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentOrderMapper
member.summary: Provides data mapping services for payment orders.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentOrdersQuery
member.summary: Query DTO used to search payment orders.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Adapters.PaymentOrdersQueryExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for RequestsQuery interface adapter.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Data.PaymentInstructionData
member.summary: Provides data read and write methods for PaymentInstruction and PaymentLog data.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Data.PaymentOrderData
member.summary: Provides data read and write methods for contract instances.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstruction
member.summary: Represents a payment instruction.

member.name: F:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionEvent.Cancel
member.summary: Cancels the whole payment instruction.

member.name: F:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionEvent.CancelPaymentRequest
member.summary: Cancels the payment request if the instruction is in waiting time.

member.name: F:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionEvent.RequestPayment
member.summary: Requests the payment associated to the instruction.

member.name: F:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionEvent.SetAsPayed
member.summary: Sets a failed electronic payment as payed.

member.name: F:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionEvent.Reset
member.summary: Resets the payment instruction returning it to Programmed status.

member.name: F:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionEvent.Suspend
member.summary: Suspends the payment instruction.

member.name: F:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionEvent.None
member.summary: Represents an empty payment instruction event.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionEventExtMethods
member.summary: Extension methods for PaymentInstructionEvent.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionLogEntry
member.summary: Holds data for a payment instruction log entry.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionRules
member.summary: Provides services to control payment instruction's rules.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionStatus
member.summary: Enumerates the status of a payment instruction.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentInstructionStatusExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for PaymentInstructionStatus.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentOrder
member.summary: Represents a payment order that serves as an aggregate root of payment instructions.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentOrderFields
member.summary: Fields structure used for create and update payment orders.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentOrderItem
member.summary: Represents an item of a payment order object.It can be a bill, a contract supply order, a service order, a loan, travel expenses, a fixed fund provision, etc.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentOrderItemFields
member.summary: Contains fields in order to create or update a payment order item.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentOrderItemType
member.summary: Represents a payment order item type.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentOrderRules
member.summary: Provides services to control payment order's rules.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentOrderStatus
member.summary: Enumerates the status of a payment order.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentOrderStatusExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for PaymentOrderStatus enumeration.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentsBrokerConfigData
member.summary: Holds a payments broker's configuration data.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentsTimeControl
member.summary: Provides services to control payment instructions timing periods and rules.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.PaymentType
member.summary: Describes a payment type related to a payment order.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.UseCases.PaymentInstructionUseCases
member.summary: Use cases for payment instructions.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.UseCases.PaymentOrderUseCases
member.summary: Use cases for payment orders management.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Processor.Adapters.BrokerRequestDto
member.summary: Integration DTO used to send requests to payment broker providers.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Processor.Adapters.BrokerResponseDto
member.summary: Integration DTO that holds a response sent by a payments broker.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Processor.IPaymentsBrokerService
member.summary: Interface to integrate payments broker service providers with Empiria Payments.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Processor.PaymentsBrokerInvoker
member.summary: Provides payment services using external broker providers.

member.name: T:Empiria.Payments.Processor.PaymentsEngine
member.summary: Engine that processes payment instructions.

member.name: M:Empiria.Payments.Processor.PaymentsEngine.Start
member.summary: Starts the execution engine for pending messages in asyncronous mode.

member.name: M:Empiria.Payments.Processor.PaymentsEngine.Stop
member.summary: Stops the execution engine.
